description: Universal GoudEngine SDK schema. Every SDK (C#, Python, TypeScript) is generated from this single file. Same tools, same methods, same inputs, same outputs.

Color.doc: RGBA color with float components in 0.0-1.0 range

Mat3x3.doc: 3x3 matrix in column-major order for 2D transforms

methods.name: translate
methods.doc: Translates by world-space offset

methods.name: translateLocal
methods.doc: Translates by local-space offset (relative to rotation)

methods.name: setPosition
methods.doc: Sets world-space position

methods.name: getPosition
methods.doc: Gets world-space position

methods.name: rotate
methods.doc: Rotates by angle in radians

methods.name: rotateDegrees
methods.doc: Rotates by angle in degrees

methods.name: setRotation
methods.doc: Sets rotation in radians

methods.name: setRotationDegrees
methods.doc: Sets rotation in degrees

methods.name: getRotation
methods.doc: Gets rotation in radians

methods.name: getRotationDegrees
methods.doc: Gets rotation in degrees

methods.name: lookAtTarget
methods.doc: Rotates to face a target point

methods.name: setScale
methods.doc: Sets non-uniform scale

methods.name: setScaleUniform
methods.doc: Sets uniform scale

methods.name: getScale
methods.doc: Gets scale as Vec2

methods.name: scaleBy
methods.doc: Multiplies current scale by factors

methods.name: forward
methods.doc: Gets the forward direction vector

methods.name: right
methods.doc: Gets the right direction vector

methods.name: backward
methods.doc: Gets the backward direction vector

methods.name: left
methods.doc: Gets the left direction vector

methods.name: matrix
methods.doc: Gets the 3x3 transformation matrix

methods.name: matrixInverse
methods.doc: Gets the inverse transformation matrix

methods.name: transformPoint
methods.doc: Transforms a point from local to world space

methods.name: transformDirection
methods.doc: Transforms a direction from local to world space

methods.name: inverseTransformPoint
methods.doc: Transforms a point from world to local space

methods.name: inverseTransformDirection
methods.doc: Transforms a direction from world to local space

methods.name: lerp
methods.doc: Linearly interpolates between this and another transform

methods.name: normalizeAngle
methods.doc: Normalizes an angle to [-PI, PI)

builder.doc: Fluent builder for constructing Transform2D instances

methods.name: new
methods.doc: Creates a builder with default values

methods.name: atPosition
methods.doc: Creates a builder at a specific position

methods.name: withPosition
methods.doc: Sets position

methods.name: withRotation
methods.doc: Sets rotation in radians

methods.name: withRotationDegrees
methods.doc: Sets rotation in degrees

methods.name: withScale
methods.doc: Sets non-uniform scale

methods.name: withScaleUniform
methods.doc: Sets uniform scale

methods.name: lookingAt
methods.doc: Rotates to face a target

methods.name: translate
methods.doc: Translates by offset

methods.name: rotate
methods.doc: Rotates by angle in radians

methods.name: scaleBy
methods.doc: Multiplies scale by factors

methods.name: build
methods.doc: Builds the Transform2D and consumes the builder

methods.name: free
methods.doc: Frees the builder without building

methods.name: setColor
methods.doc: Sets the RGBA color tint

methods.name: getColor
methods.doc: Gets the color tint as FfiColor

methods.name: withColor
methods.doc: Returns a copy with modified color

methods.name: setAlpha
methods.doc: Sets the alpha channel

methods.name: getAlpha
methods.doc: Gets the alpha channel

methods.name: setSourceRect
methods.doc: Sets the source rectangle for sprite sheets

methods.name: clearSourceRect
methods.doc: Clears the source rectangle (uses full texture)

methods.name: getSourceRect
methods.doc: Gets the source rectangle

methods.name: hasSourceRect
methods.doc: Returns true if a source rectangle is set

methods.name: withSourceRect
methods.doc: Returns a copy with a source rectangle

methods.name: setFlipX
methods.doc: Sets horizontal flip

methods.name: getFlipX
methods.doc: Gets horizontal flip state

methods.name: setFlipY
methods.doc: Sets vertical flip

methods.name: getFlipY
methods.doc: Gets vertical flip state

methods.name: setFlip
methods.doc: Sets both flip flags at once

methods.name: withFlipX
methods.doc: Returns a copy with horizontal flip

methods.name: withFlipY
methods.doc: Returns a copy with vertical flip

methods.name: withFlip
methods.doc: Returns a copy with both flip flags

methods.name: isFlipped
methods.doc: Returns true if either flip flag is set

methods.name: setAnchor
methods.doc: Sets the anchor point (normalized 0-1)

methods.name: getAnchor
methods.doc: Gets the anchor point

methods.name: withAnchor
methods.doc: Returns a copy with modified anchor

methods.name: setCustomSize
methods.doc: Sets a custom render size

methods.name: clearCustomSize
methods.doc: Clears custom size (uses texture dimensions)

methods.name: getCustomSize
methods.doc: Gets the custom size

methods.name: hasCustomSize
methods.doc: Returns true if custom size is set

methods.name: withCustomSize
methods.doc: Returns a copy with custom size

methods.name: setTexture
methods.doc: Sets the texture handle

methods.name: getTexture
methods.doc: Gets the texture handle

methods.name: sizeOrRect
methods.doc: Returns custom size if set, otherwise source rect dimensions, otherwise zero

builder.doc: Fluent builder for constructing Sprite instances

methods.name: new
methods.doc: Creates a builder with a texture handle

methods.name: default
methods.doc: Creates a builder with default values

methods.name: withTexture
methods.doc: Sets texture handle

methods.name: withColor
methods.doc: Sets color tint

methods.name: withAlpha
methods.doc: Sets alpha channel

methods.name: withSourceRect
methods.doc: Sets source rectangle

methods.name: withFlipX
methods.doc: Sets horizontal flip

methods.name: withFlipY
methods.doc: Sets vertical flip

methods.name: withFlip
methods.doc: Sets both flip flags

methods.name: withAnchor
methods.doc: Sets anchor point

methods.name: withCustomSize
methods.doc: Sets custom size

methods.name: build
methods.doc: Builds the Sprite and consumes the builder

methods.name: free
methods.doc: Frees the builder without building

fields.name: elapsed
fields.doc: Accumulated time since last frame advance (seconds)

fields.name: playing
fields.doc: Whether the animation is currently playing

fields.name: finished
fields.doc: Whether a OneShot animation has completed

fields.name: frameCount
fields.doc: Total number of frames in the clip

methods.name: getCurrentFrame
methods.doc: Returns the current frame index

methods.name: isPlaying
methods.doc: Returns whether the animation is currently playing

methods.name: isFinished
methods.doc: Returns whether the animation has finished (OneShot only)

builder.doc: Fluent builder for constructing SpriteAnimator instances via animation clips

methods.name: new
methods.doc: Creates a new animation clip builder

methods.name: addFrame
methods.doc: Adds a source rectangle frame to the animation

methods.name: build
methods.doc: Builds the SpriteAnimator and consumes the builder

methods.name: free
methods.doc: Frees the builder without building

fields.name: drawCalls
fields.doc: Number of draw calls this frame

Entity.doc: Opaque handle to an ECS entity

FpsStats.doc: Frame timing statistics from the debug overlay rolling window

fields.name: minFps
fields.doc: Minimum FPS observed in the rolling window

fields.name: maxFps
fields.doc: Maximum FPS observed in the rolling window

fields.name: avgFps
fields.doc: Average FPS across the rolling window

fields.name: frameTimeMs
fields.doc: Most recent frame time in milliseconds

methods.name: setTimestep
methods.doc: Set the fixed physics timestep in seconds

methods.name: getTimestep
methods.doc: Get the current fixed physics timestep in seconds

methods.name: setTimestep
methods.doc: Set the fixed physics timestep in seconds

methods.name: getTimestep
methods.doc: Get the current fixed physics timestep in seconds

RigidBodyHandle.doc: Handle to a rigid body in the physics simulation

ColliderHandle.doc: Handle to a collider shape attached to a rigid body

TweenHandle.doc: Handle to a running tween animation

NetworkHandle.doc: Handle to a network host or connection

Key.doc: Keyboard key codes matching GLFW values

OverlayCorner.doc: Screen corner where the debug overlay is displayed

EcsMethods.doc: Entity/component methods shared by GoudGame and GoudContext

methods.name: addName
methods.doc: Attaches a Name component to the entity

methods.name: addSprite
methods.doc: Attaches a Sprite component to the entity
methods.wasm_signature: add_sprite(bits: bigint, texture_handle: number, r: number, g: number, b: number, a: number, flip_x: boolean, flip_y: boolean, anchor_x: number, anchor_y: number): void

methods.name: addTransform2d
methods.doc: Attaches a Transform2D component to the entity
methods.wasm_signature: add_transform2d(bits: bigint, px: number, py: number, r: number, sx: number, sy: number): void

methods.name: componentAdd
methods.doc: Adds a generic component to an entity

methods.name: componentAddBatch
methods.doc: Adds a generic component to multiple entities

methods.name: componentGet
methods.doc: Gets a read-only pointer to a generic component

methods.name: componentGetMut
methods.doc: Gets a mutable pointer to a generic component

methods.name: componentHas
methods.doc: Checks if an entity has a generic component

methods.name: componentHasBatch
methods.doc: Checks if multiple entities have a generic component

methods.name: componentRegisterType
methods.doc: Registers a component type for generic operations

methods.name: componentRemove
methods.doc: Removes a generic component from an entity

methods.name: componentRemoveBatch
methods.doc: Removes a generic component from multiple entities

methods.name: despawn
methods.doc: Destroys an entity and all its components

methods.name: despawnBatch
methods.doc: Despawns multiple entities at once

methods.name: cloneEntity
methods.doc: Clones an entity, creating a new entity with copies of all cloneable components

methods.name: cloneEntityRecursive
methods.doc: Clones an entity and all its descendants recursively

methods.name: entityCount
methods.doc: Returns the number of living entities

methods.name: getName
methods.doc: Returns the entity's Name, or null if absent

methods.name: getSprite
methods.doc: Returns the entity's Sprite, or null if absent
methods.wasm_signature: get_sprite(bits: bigint): { texture_handle: number; r: number; g: number; b: number; a: number; flip_x: boolean; flip_y: boolean; anchor_x: number; anchor_y: number } | undefined

methods.name: getTransform2d
methods.doc: Returns the entity's Transform2D, or null if absent
methods.wasm_signature: get_transform2d(bits: bigint): { position_x: number; position_y: number; rotation: number; scale_x: number; scale_y: number } | undefined

methods.name: hasName
methods.doc: Returns true if the entity has a Name

methods.name: hasSprite
methods.doc: Returns true if the entity has a Sprite

methods.name: hasTransform2d
methods.doc: Returns true if the entity has a Transform2D

methods.name: isAlive
methods.doc: Returns true if the entity still exists

methods.name: isAliveBatch
methods.doc: Checks if multiple entities are alive, writing results to an output array

methods.name: removeName
methods.doc: Removes the Name from the entity

methods.name: removeSprite
methods.doc: Removes the Sprite from the entity

methods.name: removeTransform2d
methods.doc: Removes the Transform2D from the entity

methods.name: setSprite
methods.doc: Overwrites the entity's Sprite
methods.wasm_signature: set_sprite(bits: bigint, texture_handle: number, r: number, g: number, b: number, a: number, flip_x: boolean, flip_y: boolean, anchor_x: number, anchor_y: number): void

methods.name: setTransform2d
methods.doc: Overwrites the entity's Transform2D
methods.wasm_signature: set_transform2d(bits: bigint, px: number, py: number, r: number, sx: number, sy: number): void

methods.name: spawnBatch
methods.doc: Spawns multiple empty entities at once

methods.name: spawnEmpty
methods.doc: Creates a new empty entity

GoudGame.doc: Main game engine instance. Creates a window, manages rendering, input, and ECS.

methods.name: shouldClose
methods.doc: Returns true if the window close has been requested

methods.name: close
methods.doc: Signals the window to close

methods.name: destroy
methods.doc: Releases all engine resources

methods.name: beginFrame
methods.doc: Starts a new render frame with the given clear color

methods.name: endFrame
methods.doc: Finishes the current frame and presents it to the screen

methods.name: run
methods.doc: Runs the game loop. Calls the update callback each frame with delta time. Blocks until the window is closed.

params.name: update
params.doc: Per-frame update function receiving delta time in seconds

methods.name: loadTexture
methods.doc: Loads a texture from a file path and returns its handle

methods.name: destroyTexture
methods.doc: Destroys a previously loaded texture

methods.name: drawSprite
methods.doc: Draws a textured sprite
methods.wasm_signature: draw_sprite(t: number, x: number, y: number, w: number, h: number, rot: number, r: number, g: number, b: number, a: number): void

methods.name: drawQuad
methods.doc: Draws a colored rectangle
methods.wasm_signature: draw_quad(x: number, y: number, w: number, h: number, r: number, g: number, b: number, a: number): void

methods.name: isKeyPressed
methods.doc: Returns true if the key is currently held down

methods.name: isKeyJustPressed
methods.doc: Returns true if the key was pressed this frame

methods.name: isKeyJustReleased
methods.doc: Returns true if the key was released this frame

methods.name: isMouseButtonPressed
methods.doc: Returns true if the mouse button is currently held

methods.name: isMouseButtonJustPressed
methods.doc: Returns true if the mouse button was pressed this frame

methods.name: isMouseButtonJustReleased
methods.doc: Returns true if the mouse button was released this frame

methods.name: getMousePosition
methods.doc: Returns the mouse position relative to the window

methods.name: getMouseDelta
methods.doc: Returns the mouse movement since last frame

methods.name: getScrollDelta
methods.doc: Returns the scroll wheel delta this frame

methods.name: createCube
methods.doc: Creates a 3D cube

methods.name: createPlane
methods.doc: Creates a 3D plane

methods.name: createSphere
methods.doc: Creates a 3D sphere

methods.name: createCylinder
methods.doc: Creates a 3D cylinder

methods.name: setObjectPosition
methods.doc: Sets a 3D object's position

methods.name: setObjectRotation
methods.doc: Sets a 3D object's rotation in degrees

methods.name: setObjectScale
methods.doc: Sets a 3D object's scale

methods.name: destroyObject
methods.doc: Destroys a 3D object

methods.name: addLight
methods.doc: Adds a light to the 3D scene

methods.name: updateLight
methods.doc: Updates a light's properties

methods.name: removeLight
methods.doc: Removes a light

methods.name: setCameraPosition3D
methods.doc: Sets the 3D camera position

methods.name: setCameraRotation3D
methods.doc: Sets the 3D camera rotation

methods.name: configureGrid
methods.doc: Configures the ground grid

methods.name: setGridEnabled
methods.doc: Sets grid visibility

methods.name: configureSkybox
methods.doc: Configures the skybox/background color

methods.name: configureFog
methods.doc: Configures fog settings

methods.name: setFogEnabled
methods.doc: Sets fog visibility

methods.name: render3D
methods.doc: Renders all 3D objects

methods.name: drawSpriteRect
methods.doc: Draws a sprite with source rectangle for sprite sheets
methods.wasm_signature: draw_sprite_rect(t: number, x: number, y: number, w: number, h: number, rot: number, src_x: number, src_y: number, src_w: number, src_h: number, r: number, g: number, b: number, a: number): boolean

methods.name: setViewport
methods.doc: Sets the rendering viewport

methods.name: enableDepthTest
methods.doc: Enables depth testing

methods.name: disableDepthTest
methods.doc: Disables depth testing

methods.name: clearDepth
methods.doc: Clears the depth buffer

methods.name: disableBlending
methods.doc: Disables alpha blending

methods.name: getRenderStats
methods.doc: Returns rendering statistics for the current frame
methods.wasm_signature: get_render_stats(): { draw_calls: number; triangles: number; texture_binds: number; shader_binds: number } | undefined

methods.name: getFpsStats
methods.doc: Returns FPS statistics from the debug overlay rolling window

methods.name: setFpsOverlayEnabled
methods.doc: Enables or disables the FPS debug overlay

methods.name: setFpsUpdateInterval
methods.doc: Sets how often FPS statistics are recomputed

methods.name: setFpsOverlayCorner
methods.doc: Sets the screen corner where the FPS overlay is displayed

methods.name: mapActionKey
methods.doc: Maps an action name to a key

methods.name: isActionPressed
methods.doc: Returns true if the action is currently pressed

methods.name: isActionJustPressed
methods.doc: Returns true if the action was pressed this frame

methods.name: isActionJustReleased
methods.doc: Returns true if the action was released this frame

methods.name: collisionAabbAabb
methods.doc: AABB vs AABB collision test with contact
methods.wasm_signature: collision_aabb_aabb(cax: number, cay: number, hwa: number, hha: number, cbx: number, cby: number, hwb: number, hhb: number): { point_x: number; point_y: number; normal_x: number; normal_y: number; penetration: number } | undefined

methods.name: collisionCircleCircle
methods.doc: Circle vs circle collision test
methods.wasm_signature: collision_circle_circle(cax: number, cay: number, ra: number, cbx: number, cby: number, rb: number): { point_x: number; point_y: number; normal_x: number; normal_y: number; penetration: number } | undefined

methods.name: collisionCircleAabb
methods.doc: Circle vs AABB collision test
methods.wasm_signature: collision_circle_aabb(cx: number, cy: number, cr: number, bx: number, by: number, bhw: number, bhh: number): { point_x: number; point_y: number; normal_x: number; normal_y: number; penetration: number } | undefined

methods.name: pointInRect
methods.doc: Tests if a point is inside a rectangle
methods.wasm_signature: point_in_rect(px: number, py: number, rx: number, ry: number, rw: number, rh: number): boolean

methods.name: pointInCircle
methods.doc: Tests if a point is inside a circle
methods.wasm_signature: point_in_circle(px: number, py: number, cx: number, cy: number, r: number): boolean

methods.name: aabbOverlap
methods.doc: Fast AABB overlap test
methods.wasm_signature: aabb_overlap(minax: number, minay: number, maxax: number, maxay: number, minbx: number, minby: number, maxbx: number, maxby: number): boolean

methods.name: circleOverlap
methods.doc: Fast circle overlap test
methods.wasm_signature: circle_overlap(x1: number, y1: number, r1: number, x2: number, y2: number, r2: number): boolean

methods.name: distance
methods.doc: Distance between two points
methods.wasm_signature: distance(x1: number, y1: number, x2: number, y2: number): number

methods.name: distanceSquared
methods.doc: Squared distance between two points
methods.wasm_signature: distance_squared(x1: number, y1: number, x2: number, y2: number): number

wasm_interface.sig: set_clear_color(r: number, g: number, b: number, a: number): void

EngineConfig.doc: Builder for configuring and creating a GoudGame instance with provider selection.

methods.name: setTitle
methods.doc: Sets the window title

methods.name: setSize
methods.doc: Sets the window size in pixels

methods.name: setVsync
methods.doc: Enables or disables vertical sync

methods.name: setFullscreen
methods.doc: Enables or disables fullscreen mode

methods.name: setTargetFps
methods.doc: Sets the target frames per second

methods.name: setFpsOverlay
methods.doc: Enables or disables the FPS debug overlay

methods.name: build
methods.doc: Consumes the config and creates a windowed GoudGame instance

methods.name: destroy
methods.doc: Frees the config without building

GoudContext.doc: Headless engine context for CI tests and non-windowed entity management.

methods.name: sceneCreate
methods.doc: Creates a new named scene and returns its ID

methods.name: sceneDestroy
methods.doc: Destroys a scene by ID

methods.name: sceneGetByName
methods.doc: Looks up a scene ID by name

methods.name: sceneSetActive
methods.doc: Sets whether a scene is active

methods.name: sceneIsActive
methods.doc: Checks if a scene is active

methods.name: sceneCount
methods.doc: Returns the number of scenes

methods.name: sceneSetCurrent
methods.doc: Sets which scene subsequent entity/component operations target

methods.name: sceneGetCurrent
methods.doc: Returns the currently targeted scene ID

methods.name: create

methods.name: destroy

AnimationController.doc: State machine controller for entity animations

methods.name: create
methods.doc: Creates an animation controller for an entity

methods.name: addState
methods.doc: Adds a named animation state

methods.name: addTransition
methods.doc: Adds a transition between two states

methods.name: setState
methods.doc: Sets the current animation state

methods.name: getState
methods.doc: Gets the current animation state name

methods.name: update
methods.doc: Updates the animation controller

Tween.doc: Interpolation animation between two values with easing

methods.name: create
methods.doc: Creates a new tween and returns its handle

methods.name: update
methods.doc: Updates the tween by delta time

methods.name: value
methods.doc: Gets the current interpolated value

methods.name: isComplete
methods.doc: Returns whether the tween has finished

methods.name: reset
methods.doc: Resets the tween to its initial state

methods.name: destroy
methods.doc: Destroys the tween and frees its storage

methods.name: create
methods.doc: Creates a skeleton for an entity

methods.name: addBone
methods.doc: Adds a bone to the skeleton

methods.name: setBoneTransform
methods.doc: Sets the transform of a bone by index

methods.name: playClip
methods.doc: Plays a named animation clip

Network.doc: Networking transport layer supporting UDP and WebSocket

methods.name: host
methods.doc: Starts hosting on a port

methods.name: connect
methods.doc: Connects to a remote host

methods.name: disconnect
methods.doc: Disconnects a network handle

methods.name: send
methods.doc: Sends data to a peer

methods.name: receive
methods.doc: Receives data from a peer

methods.name: poll
methods.doc: Polls the network for events

methods.name: getStats
methods.doc: Gets network statistics

methods.name: peerCount
methods.doc: Returns the number of connected peers

methods.name: register
methods.doc: Registers a plugin by ID

methods.name: unregister
methods.doc: Unregisters a plugin by ID

methods.name: isRegistered
methods.doc: Checks if a plugin is registered

methods.name: list
methods.doc: Lists all registered plugins

codes.name: NotInitialized
codes.hint: Call the initialization function first

codes.name: AlreadyInitialized
codes.hint: Shut down the engine before re-initializing

codes.name: InvalidContext
codes.hint: Ensure the context was properly created and not corrupted

codes.name: ContextDestroyed
codes.hint: Re-initialize the engine to obtain a new context

codes.name: InitializationFailed
codes.hint: Check the error message for details and verify dependencies

codes.name: ResourceNotFound
codes.hint: Verify the file path and check the working directory

codes.name: ResourceLoadFailed
codes.hint: Check file permissions and ensure the file is not locked

codes.name: ResourceInvalidFormat
codes.hint: Verify the file is not corrupted and uses a supported format

codes.name: ResourceAlreadyExists
codes.hint: Use a unique identifier or remove the existing resource first

codes.name: InvalidHandle
codes.hint: Ensure the handle was obtained from a valid creation call

codes.name: HandleExpired
codes.hint: Re-create the resource to get a new handle

codes.name: HandleTypeMismatch
codes.hint: Pass the correct handle type for the operation

codes.name: ShaderCompilationFailed
codes.hint: Review shader source; the error message contains GPU compiler output

codes.name: ShaderLinkFailed
codes.hint: Verify shader stage inputs/outputs match and uniforms are declared

codes.name: TextureCreationFailed
codes.hint: Check texture dimensions and format; reduce size or free GPU resources

codes.name: BufferCreationFailed
codes.hint: Reduce buffer size or free unused GPU buffers

codes.name: RenderTargetFailed
codes.hint: Verify attachment formats and dimensions are consistent

codes.name: BackendNotSupported
codes.hint: Update GPU drivers or select a different supported backend

codes.name: DrawCallFailed
codes.hint: Verify buffer bindings and shader state; try updating GPU drivers

codes.name: EntityNotFound
codes.hint: Verify the entity ID is valid and has not been despawned

codes.name: EntityAlreadyExists
codes.hint: Use a different entity ID or remove the existing entity first

codes.name: ComponentNotFound
codes.hint: Attach the component before accessing it, or check with a has-component query

codes.name: ComponentAlreadyExists
codes.hint: Use replace/update instead of add, or remove the existing component first

codes.name: QueryFailed
codes.hint: Check for conflicting mutable/immutable access on the same component

codes.name: InputDeviceNotFound
codes.hint: Verify the input device is connected and recognized by the OS

codes.name: InvalidInputAction
codes.hint: Check the action name matches a registered input action

codes.name: WindowCreationFailed
codes.hint: Verify display server is running and window parameters are valid

codes.name: AudioInitFailed
codes.hint: Check that an audio output device is available

codes.name: PhysicsInitFailed
codes.hint: Review physics configuration for invalid values

codes.name: PlatformError
codes.hint: Check the error message for platform-specific details

codes.name: ProviderInitFailed
codes.hint: Check provider configuration and dependencies

codes.name: ProviderNotFound
codes.hint: Register the provider before accessing it

codes.name: ProviderOperationFailed
codes.hint: Check the error message for operation-specific details

codes.name: InternalError
codes.hint: Report the error with full details; this is likely an engine bug

codes.name: NotImplemented
codes.hint: Use an alternative approach or wait for the feature to be implemented

codes.name: InvalidState
codes.hint: Check the sequence of API calls; the engine may need re-initialization
